task:
Krita is open with /home/user/Documents/photo_crop.kra loaded — canvas currently 1600x900.

Crop the canvas down to a centered 1200x800 region, then expand the canvas outwards by 30 pixels on every side so the final canvas is exactly 1260x860. The original 1200x800 image content must sit centered inside a 30-pixel-wide solid black border.

Save the file in place at /home/user/Documents/photo_crop.kra.

verification.description: Merged preview matches new canvas size
